Explore Scheme Guides

Find simple, easy-to-understand guides for major government benefits. Learn if you qualify, what documents you need, and how to apply step-by-step.

Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY

Explore the full eligibility guide, key exclusions, documents needed, and the online check tool for Ayushman Card.

More Schemes Coming Soon

We are constantly adding new central and state government schemes to our portal. Check back soon for guides on pension, education, and housing schemes.

MeraLabh.

MeraLabh is a public-facing information portal that simplifies Indian government scheme rules to help everyday citizens understand their benefits.

Official Support

Official PM-JAY national helpline operates 24/7 for beneficiary queries:

14555

Disclaimer: MeraLabh is an independent informational website and is not affiliated with the National Health Authority, the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare, or any state or central government. The official portal is located at pmjay.gov.in.
